description: Geṭ (bill of divorce). Location: Cairo (אלמעזיה אלקאהרה). Husband: Hillel b. Ḥalfon ha-Levi. Wife: Sitt al-Khawāt bt. [...]. Dated: Tammuz 1[4]50 of the Seleucid era (= June 1139 CE). Signed by Moshe b. Ṣadoq and Ḥalfon b. Natan. Verso contains the receipt, including the name ʿEli ha-Kohen. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
